name: harness-init
description: Bootstrap or migrate repositories into a Codex-ready harness with migration maps, knowledge-base docs, boundary checks, and GC guidance

interface.shortDescription: Bootstrap or migrate a repository into a Codex-ready harness.
interface.longDescription: Scaffold a Codex plugin that creates migration maps, knowledge-base docs, architecture checks, and optional capability packs for agent-first repository work.
defaultPrompt: Bootstrap this repo into the harness-init architecture.
Migrate this existing repo into the harness-init layout safely.
Add eval and observability packs to this harness.
